nasb.text: it is you, O king; for you have become great and grown strong, and your majesty has become great and reached to the sky and your dominion to the end of the earth.

esv.text: it is you, O king, who have grown and become strong. Your greatness has grown and reaches to heaven, and your dominion to the ends of the earth.

cnv.text: 王啊！你就是那樹，越來越偉大堅強；你的威勢漸長，高達於天；你的權柄直到地極。

ccb.text: 王啊，这苍劲有力的树就是你，你的威名高达穹苍，你的权柄延至地极。
